What We Offer

Our Services

Tap any card to see how it works & how it benefits your life

📐

Education First

We believe informed clients make better decisions. Every engagement begins with building your financial literacy from the ground up.

How it works
How It Works

Knowledge is your most powerful financial asset

  • We start with a no-pressure discovery call to understand your current situation and goals
  • Christopher walks you through financial concepts in plain language — no jargon, no confusion
  • You receive a personalized education roadmap tailored to your life stage
  • Ongoing check-ins keep you sharp as your needs evolve
💡 Confident decisions. Zero overwhelm. Tap to flip back
🛡️

Life Insurance & IUL

Term, whole life, and Indexed Universal Life policies designed to protect your family and grow cash value tax-advantaged over time.

How it works
How It Works

Protection today. Wealth-building for tomorrow.

  • We assess your coverage needs based on income, debts, and dependents
  • Term life provides affordable, temporary protection for your family's most critical years
  • IUL policies grow cash value tied to market indexes — with a floor so you never lose to downturns
  • Access your cash value tax-free for retirement, emergencies, or opportunities
🛡️ Your family protected. Your wealth growing. Tap to flip back
📈

Retirement & Annuities

Fixed, indexed, and MYGA annuities alongside 401(k), IRA, and Roth IRA strategies — building guaranteed income you can never outlive.

How it works
How It Works

Guaranteed income. Dignified retirement.

  • We map your savings, income needs, and retirement timeline to find the right strategy
  • Fixed & Indexed Annuities (FIA) provide guaranteed growth with zero market loss risk
  • MYGAs lock in a guaranteed rate for a set term — like a CD but with better rates
  • Roth IRA strategies layer in tax-free income alongside your annuity payments
  • SPIAs turn a lump sum into a guaranteed paycheck for life — income you can never outlive
🌅 Guaranteed income. Peace of mind for life. Tap to flip back
🧒

Children's Whole Life

Lock in lifelong coverage for your child at the lowest possible rates. Build cash value they can borrow against for college, a home, or a business.

How it works
How It Works

Give your child a financial head start for life.

  • Premiums are lowest when a child is young — lock in rates they keep for life regardless of future health
  • The policy builds cash value year over year, completely tax-deferred
  • At adulthood, they can borrow against it for college tuition, a first home, or a business launch
  • Coverage never expires — a gift that grows with them forever
🎁 The greatest financial gift a parent can give. Tap to flip back
🕊️

Final Expense

Affordable, guaranteed coverage that ensures your loved ones are never burdened with funeral costs or end-of-life expenses. Peace of mind for the whole family.

How it works
How It Works

Protect your family from an unexpected burden.

  • Simple, streamlined application — no medical exam required in most cases
  • Coverage amounts typically range from $5,000–$35,000 to cover funeral, burial, and related costs
  • Premiums are fixed and affordable, even for seniors on a fixed income
  • Benefits paid directly to your chosen beneficiary — quickly and without hassle
🕊️ Leave love, not debt, behind. Tap to flip back
🏛️

Legacy Planning

Your financial story doesn't end with you. We help you create a legacy that sustains and supports the people you care about most.

How it works
How It Works

Build wealth that outlives you by generations.

  • We review your assets, policies, and beneficiary designations to find gaps
  • Structure life insurance as a wealth transfer vehicle — passing on tax-free benefits to heirs
  • Coordinate strategies so your estate avoids unnecessary taxes and delays
  • Create a plan your family can execute clearly and confidently when the time comes
👑 A legacy that speaks long after you're gone. Tap to flip back
📊

Annuities

Fixed, Indexed, and MYGA annuities that turn your savings into guaranteed lifetime income — with zero market risk. No variable annuities. Ever.

How it works
How It Works

Guaranteed income you can never outlive.

  • Fixed Annuity — A guaranteed interest rate for a set period. Predictable, safe, tax-deferred growth.
  • Fixed Indexed Annuity (FIA) — Returns tied to a market index with a floor of 0%. Grow with the market, never lose to it.
  • MYGA — Multi-Year Guaranteed Annuity. Like a CD but with higher rates and tax-deferred compounding.
  • SPIA / Deferred Income — Convert a lump sum into a guaranteed paycheck for life or a set term.
📊 Growth without risk. Income without worry. Tap to flip back
Meet Your Advisor
Christopher Collins
CRC Financial Services · Houston, TX
Meet Your Advisor

From California keys to Houston financial freedom

Christopher Collins built his career as a real estate agent in California — and there was nothing quite like handing a client their keys at closing. The joy on their faces, the weight of that milestone. He was genuinely happy for every one of them.

But once the transaction closed, something felt incomplete. After a deliberate three-month pause to reflect, Christopher was introduced to the financial services industry — and everything clicked. The ability to stay in people's lives long after the handshake. To educate them on strategies they'd never been introduced to. To help them protect their families and build toward a retirement they could actually enjoy.

Now based in Houston, TX — with roots in Chino Hills, CA — Christopher brings that same California warmth and relationship-first mindset to every client he serves.

CA→TXChino Hills to Houston
∞Ongoing Relationships

"I was happy for my clients, but I only felt partially fulfilled. The relationship ended right when the real journey was beginning for them."

— Christopher Collins, Founder · CRC Financial Services
